rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies one prior work and articulates the delta in terms of CheXbert F1 points, but does not map against a set of works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., deployment readiness), but not for all.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unsupported deployment-readiness rhetoric).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
